name: hermes-todo
description: Task management app — orchestrator that runs server (Express+SQLite) and client (Vite+React) together.

scripts.dev:fallback: concurrently -k -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install --build-from-source --foreground-scripts && npm --prefix server install --build-from-source --foreground-scripts && npm --prefix client install
